value.found_quote:
Gemini app
Your personal, proactive and powerful AI Assistant
value.rationale: The page clearly describes the "Gemini app" as an offering from Google, listing it under multiple subscription tiers (Free, AI Plus, AI Pro, AI Ultra) as a core product. It is presented as generally available ("Get started") with no indication of deprecation or sunset. The page is Google's official Gemini about/landing page, substantiating that Google offers the Gemini app.
